appraisal_events.evidence: « elle craignait ses reproches s'il se rendait compte qu'elle avait reçu un Juif plus ou moins affilié au “syndicat”. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Within the anti-dreyfusard milieu (embodied by the archivist), having received Bloch marks the marquise for potential reproach, showing Bloch’s local discredit/exclusion by association with the ‘syndicat’; the narration subtly distances itself from this policing.

status_effects.explanation: He is placed at risk of social exclusion and reproach in this setting due to anti-dreyfusard gatekeeping.
